conflicts.description: Chapter 3 introduces the linesman as Arthur Pike, while chapter 7's billeting order and narration identify the same man as Arthur Hale.
conflicts.canonical_value: Arthur Hale (with 'Arthur Pike' retained as Tom's mistaken/colloquial reference).
conflicts.resolution_note: Council paperwork and repeated later usage are structurally embedded in billeting/legal scenes, so Hale is canonical.

conflicts.description: Noreen reports 31 weeks by dates in chapter 12, while chapter 14 emergency assessment estimates labor at roughly 34 weeks (or slightly less).
conflicts.canonical_value: Preterm delivery with uncertain exact week; maternal dating about 31 weeks, clinician emergency estimate about 34 or less.
conflicts.resolution_note: Both values are causally used (risk framing and delivery triage). Canon records bounded uncertainty instead of forcing a single week.

conflicts.description: Prior sheet treated Baby Goods debt as warning-stage arrears; manuscript escalates to active doorstep collection with fixed weekly installments.
conflicts.canonical_value: Arrears remain active; chapter 18 sets GBP 1 weekly Thursday payment schedule with escalation after two misses.
conflicts.resolution_note: Late-cycle multi-scene collection mechanics supersede earlier warning-only status and directly drive chapter 18 decisions.

conflicts.description: Prior sheet kept bookmaker debt as approximate and static; manuscript confirms explicit figures, enforcement actors, and ongoing balance changes.
conflicts.canonical_value: Debt peaks near GBP 147 by chapter 13, declines to about GBP 90 by chapter 18, and remains active under Billy Cragg enforcement.
conflicts.resolution_note: Amounts are repeatedly stated in causally central confession/enforcement scenes; dynamic debt status is canonical.

conflicts.description: Tom claims he is staying with brother Stan after chapter 13 separation, but chapter 17/18 witness checks state he was not at Stan's and remained unreachable during labor crisis.
conflicts.canonical_value: Tom's precise location during chapter 17 remains unknown; continuity treats him as absent and unreliable, not verifiably at Stan's.
conflicts.resolution_note: Multiple independent checks during active labor are more causally binding than Tom's earlier self-report.
